findings.title: Description mismatch between marketplace.json and plugin.json
findings.snippet: "description": "Comprehensive codebase analysis across 4 standard dimensions (structure, quality, security, testing) — produces scored reports with critic validation and focused refactoring plans. v0.8.0 adds token optimizations (split schemas, skip-clean ralph-loop passes, inline scoring, smart model defaults)."
findings.description: The marketplace.json entry description ('Multi-dimensional codebase analysis across 4 standard dimensions (structure, quality, security, testing) with plugin-specific analysis mode, scored reports, critic validation, and refactoring plan generation') differs from plugin.json description ('Comprehensive codebase analysis across 4 standard dimensions... produces scored reports... v0.8.0 adds token optimizations...'). Key divergences: (1) marketplace uses 'Multi-dimensional', plugin.json uses 'Comprehensive'; (2) plugin.json embeds version-specific changelog detail ('v0.8.0 adds token optimizations...') which does not belong in a description field; (3) marketplace entry references 'plugin-specific analysis mode' while plugin.json omits it from the description. Both sources should share a canonical, stable description.
findings.recommendation: Craft a single canonical description in plugin.json that is version-agnostic and covers the core capability. Update marketplace.json to match it exactly, or use a deliberate subset. Remove version changelog details from the description field — those belong in the changelog section only.

findings.title: Tags present in plugin.json but absent in marketplace entry
findings.description: plugin.json declares 9 keywords (dev, analysis, refactoring, code-quality, structure, security, testing, scoring, plugin-analysis) but the marketplace entry for code-analysis has no tags or keywords field. While the marketplace schema does not require a tags field on plugin entries, aligning keywords between both sources improves discoverability and search indexing in future marketplace tooling.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding a 'tags' array to the code-analysis marketplace entry mirroring the plugin.json keywords, or accept the divergence as intentional omission.
